body.title: Consequence check: proactive advisor() in /sorted for L/XL tickets
body.result: PARTIAL: advisor() wired at /sorted step 3.5; gate not met (0/3 L/XL tickets post-change); no AMEND loops or cost signals observable yet
body.intention: I intend that the advisor() call at L/XL draft time is worth the token cost.
body.description:
**What changed:** /sorted calls advisor() before filing L/XL ticket drafts.

**Predicted unintended effects:** (1) Each L/XL /sorted run costs an additional advisor() call — verify quality gain justifies cost; (2) advisor() may give advice contradicting /audit-ticket — watch for AMEND loops; (3) S-ticket quality gap may widen if advisor() is too impactful — consider lowering threshold to M.

**Signals to watch:** L/XL tickets post-change: more specific completion criteria? Sprint reset_count for L/XL: decreasing? Any AMEND loop between advisor() and /audit-ticket.

**Gate condition:** After 3 L/XL tickets filed via /sorted with advisor() active.

**Affected files:** None — observation only
**Design rules:** none apply
**Scope boundary:** Observe; annotate as occurred / clear / partial and close
**Completion criteria:** observation ticket; done when predicted effects annotated and ticket closed
